top_signals.title: Paramount Open to Selling Kids Channels to Quell EU Fears Over $110 Billion Warner Deal
top_signals.summary: Paramount Skydance Corp. is prepared — if necessary — to divest some children’s TV network assets to help win European Union approval of its $110 billion bid for Warner Bros. Discovery Inc.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Next up, taxes: Crypto tax legislation circulated ahead of House Ways and Means Committee hearing next week
top_signals.summary: As cryptocurrency-related bills from regulating stablecoins to the market as a whole take center stage — now comes how to tax those assets.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
